events.title: Roncesvalles Polish Festival 2026 — 20th Anniversary
events.venue: Roncesvalles Avenue, Roncesvalles Village, Toronto
events.raw_excerpt: September 19th & 20th, 2026. Roncesvalles Village, Toronto. Saturday 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM, Sunday 11:00 AM – 7:00 PM. 20th anniversary. North America's largest celebration of Polish culture. Scotiabank Polkamania Stage, Main Stage, Garden Stage. Pierogi-eating contest, cultural performances.

events.title: Nuit Blanche Toronto 2026 (20th anniversary, 'Tomorrow's Memories')
events.venue: Multiple sites citywide, including Canada Malting Silos waterfront and Humber Polytechnic Lakeshore
events.raw_excerpt: 20th-anniversary edition. Theme: Tomorrow's Memories. 7 PM Oct 3 through 7 AM Oct 4.

events.title: Nuit Blanche Toronto 2026 — 20th Anniversary: Tomorrow's Memories
events.venue: City-wide, Toronto (public spaces and institutions across the city)
events.raw_excerpt: October 3-4, 2026. 7 p.m. October 3 to 7 a.m. October 4. Toronto's free all-night celebration of contemporary art. Theme: Tomorrow's Memories marks the festival's 20th anniversary, looking back to the artists, curators, communities and places that defined Nuit Blanche and hold its histories. Since 2006: nearly 1,800 art installations by approximately 6,350 artists.

events.title: Sunday Best: An exhibition of Black style and self-fashioning
events.venue: Art Gallery of Ontario, 317 Dundas Street West
events.speaker_or_director: Curated by Julie Crooks and Jason Cyrus

events.title: Toronto International Festival of Authors (IFOA) 2026
events.venue: Victoria University at the University of Toronto, Toronto
events.raw_excerpt: October 27–November 1, 2026. Victoria University at the University of Toronto. New 5-day format with over 100 events including conversations, masterclasses, talks, and readings. Presented in partnership with Victoria University and the Victoria Centre for Creativity.

events.title: Toronto Reel Asian International Film Festival 2026 — 30th Anniversary
events.venue: Toronto (venues TBA — typically TIFF Lightbox and partner cinemas)
events.raw_excerpt: Reel Asian celebrates its 30th anniversary in 2026. The 30th Toronto Reel Asian International Film Festival this November. Fire Horse Award Gala & Fundraiser 2026 — Ana Serrano named as 2026 recipient. Held each November in Toronto. Exact 2026 dates not yet confirmed on official site.
